クラス ProfileFileAdapter

java.lang.Object
mechanics.optimization.ProfileFileAdapter
public final class ProfileFileAdapter extends Object
Boundary adapter for the plain-text profile file format.

This class is the only place in the optimization flow that should know how a CharacterId maps to profiles/<CharacterName>.txt. Parsing remains delegated to ProfileLoader.
